summary: Base W8 — scheduled −30% deload (~14 mpw) under the v4.3 reshape, and the 2026-06-09 full-system audit landed: calendar re-anchored to race day (v4.4, Adj #71 — Base extended W5–W14 with a shallower W9+ ramp, W9 re-entry ~16 mpw, deloads W8/W12/W18/W24, 5K-TT gate now W14 Jul 24–25, race = W27 Sat Oct 24); tennis elbow reported NOT clean so the preacher/pushdown caps stay and the 2nd-biceps-movement push defers (Adj #72); seated calf goes 2×/wk from W9 (Wed light-controlled + Sat main, NO calf set to failure while the Achilles is reactive, Adj #73). This week unchanged on the ground: threshold 3×6 @ T sits Wed after the Tue↔Wed swap (Hyp A was Tue 6/9 incl. the incline AMRAP/TM re-test), Mon/Thu easy, Fri easy + strides, Sat 45 min long + Hyp B (calf owed, 325 controlled). Both tendons still gate everything: hill strides held (Adj #44), calf 335 held (Adj #40), W9 step-up decision at the Sun 6/14 boundary needs AM-clean reads (Adj #65/#71).

days.note: Logged — 30 min, treadmill 1%, 10:45/mi (Z1 ceiling), cadence 168, HR avg 160/peak 168. SI clean; L Achilles pain-free during, R knee quiet (first no-signal read since #63) — AM read not given, holds persist (Adj #70).

One-week Tue↔Wed swap (athlete call) — Hyp A pulled here, threshold pushed to Wed. Incline = §5 AMRAP/TM re-test (last W4 → TM 165), supersedes the 145 repeat (Adj #47/#27) → AMRAP @ 135. Audit bumps land (Adj #68): DB lat 6×12 @ 30, preacher 4×10 @ 60 (hold-until-clean), pushdown 4×12 @ 55 (hold-until-clean), decline crunch BW 3×12 (new, Adj #66).

Threshold pushed here by the Tue↔Wed swap. Run-only. Hold 8:00/mi (confirmed legit T, Adj #26; ran quick W7 = may have room, watch but don't recalibrate before W12). Default §2.A ordering resumes W9 (Adj #53). Report AM Achilles + R patellar (Adj #63/#64) — gates the W9 step-up (Adj #65).
Recovery aerobic (trimmed, deload). Revert to rest on a yellow/red AM (§11.C). Vomero, flat, easy.
Deload — no VO2max yet (Base). Flat strides only (hill strides held, Adj #44); carry the cadence cap (≤180 spm, ~6:00/mi, Adj #25 — nailed clean W7 Fri).

Long trimmed to 45 (deload), flat, Vomero. Hyp B audit (Adj #68/#69): bump lat 155 (#55) + chest-supp row 90 (#56); ESTABLISH new Sat DB lateral ~25–30 (#69); preacher 4×12 / pushdown 4×15 holds; decline crunch BW 3×10 (new); calf OWED (skipped W7) — keep 325 controlled, 335 still held until AM-clean Achilles (#40/#61); DB flye cut.

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. W8→W9 boundary: recheck BOTH tendons (AM Achilles + R patellar) — clean = W9 re-entry ~16 mpw proceeds (v4.4 §4.C); still reactive = run W9 at W8-deload volumes (Adj #65/#71).
